logo_fidelity.description: How well the logo is displayed across ALL pages. 5=perfect, 1=missing/broken.

colour_match.description: How well brand colours match across ALL pages. 5=professional palette, 1=clashing/default.

copy_accuracy.description: How accurate business copy is across ALL pages. 5=all accurate, 1=placeholders/wrong.

layout_integrity.description: Page layout quality across ALL pages. 5=polished, 1=broken/overlapping.

brand_cohesion.description: Overall branded feel across ALL pages. 5=professional, 1=generic template.

text_legibility.description: Text legibility against backgrounds on ALL pages. 5=excellent contrast, 1=unreadable text.

page_issues.description: Specific issues found on individual pages. Empty array if no issues.

page.description: Page name: homepage, services, about, projects, contact

dimension.description: Which scoring dimension this issue affects
